---
title: "Citation"
---

If you use `ti` in your research or publications, please cite it as:

```
Hagan A (2025). ti: Business Intelligence Toolkit for Financial Planning & Analysis.
R package version 4.0.0. https://codeberg.org/usrbinr/ti
```

### BibTeX

```bibtex
@Manual{ti,
  title = {ti: Business Intelligence Toolkit for Financial Planning & Analysis},
  author = {Alejandro Hagan},
  year = {2025},
  url = {https://codeberg.org/usrbinr/ti},
  note = {R package version 4.0.0},
}
```

### In R

```r
citation("ti")
```
